reason: Successfully verified that the agent can execute browser tools, navigate to a URL, retrieve the page title, and return a response containing "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — App loaded successfully showing the Super Agent interface with list of agents
Clicked on the "QA-20260612-224719-zqnn" agent in the main content area — Agent opened with chat interface visible and a session "Browser Navigation and Page Title Check" was created
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field — Message entered and visible in the textbox
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, agent changed status from idle to working
Waited up to 3 minutes for response using browser wait mechanism — Agent completed processing in approximately 12 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" and captured screenshot — Agent's final response clearly states: "The page title is "Example Domain"." Multiple browser tools executed successfully (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser MCP: Browser Get State, Close Browser)
